description: Sample escalation cases representing the range of complexity CSMs encounter. Useful for testing workflow decomposition and automation classification solutions.

cases.trigger: VP of Operations (Carol Whitmore) called Jamie directly — not via Zendesk ticket
cases.stated_issue: API rate limit errors causing integration to fail. Fleet tracking data not updating for 6 hours.
cases.sla_breach_risk: HIGH — 1-hour SLA and CSM wasn't notified via Zendesk, only via direct call 22 minutes after issue started
complicating_factors: This is the third API-related issue in 30 days for this account
Carol Whitmore mentioned in passing that they've been 'evaluating alternatives' — potential churn signal
CSM must decide whether to invoke SLA credit proactively before client asks

resolution.root_cause: API rate limit configuration had been incorrectly set during a platform upgrade 48 hours prior
resolution.client_outcome: Satisfied but watching. VP noted appreciation for proactive credit offer.

cases.trigger: Zendesk ticket #84655 — submitted by AP Manager (Linda Chen)
cases.stated_issue: Invoice for January shows $2,400 overcharge. Requesting credit.
complicating_factors: Salesforce account ID not linked in Zendesk ticket — CSM had to search manually
Renewal is in 2.5 months — billing dispute this close to renewal is a churn risk
CSM pulled wrong DocuSign contract initially (original MSA, not current amendment with pricing)

resolution.root_cause: Billing system applied incorrect seat count after a user was deprovisioned but the billing record wasn't updated
resolution.client_outcome: Resolved. Account stable. Renewal conversation initiated as part of resolution call.

csm_time_breakdown.note: Salesforce activity log was skipped due to back-to-back calls

cases.trigger: Zendesk ticket #84590 — submitted by IT Admin (Robert Park)
cases.stated_issue: Fleet data sync delay of 6 hours observed. Expected sync frequency is 15 minutes.
complicating_factors: Zendesk ticket history shows 3 prior sync issues in the past 60 days — pattern not visible in Salesforce
Account renewal in 4 months with no current expansion opportunity flagged
CSM recognized pattern and used the escalation call to gauge expansion interest — judgment call that created unexpected value

resolution.root_cause: Recurring sync delay tied to specific vehicle class (Class 8 trucks) with a known but unpatched firmware integration bug
resolution.client_outcome: Resolution in progress. Client appreciated CSM identifying the pattern across tickets.
resolution.expansion_outcome: Client expressed interest in adding the Compliance module — CSM created expansion opportunity in CRM

cases.trigger: Zendesk ticket #84512 — submitted by Operations Manager (Sarah Obi)
cases.stated_issue: User cannot export monthly reports. Getting 403 Forbidden error.
complicating_factors: CSM pulled wrong contract version initially — pulled original MSA instead of current amendment
Basic tier account — limited contract SLA, lower priority
CSM judgment call: is this worth a full escalation workflow or can it be resolved quickly?

resolution.root_cause: User role had been incorrectly configured during a permissions audit last month
resolution.client_outcome: Resolved quickly. Account is healthy. No churn risk.
resolution.csm_note: Skipped follow-up ticket creation and Calendly scheduling — Basic tier account, quick resolution, didn't seem necessary

cases.trigger: Executive sponsor (CFO James Hartley) emailed VP of Customer Success (not the CSM) — cascaded to CSM 3 hours later
cases.stated_issue: Monthly usage report delivered to board shows completely different numbers than what the Vertex platform displays. Audit compliance risk.
cases.sla_breach_risk: CRITICAL — Escalation routed through executive channel, not ticketing system. SLA clock never started. Issue already 3 hours old when CSM was notified.
complicating_factors: Escalation bypassed ticketing system entirely — arrived via executive email chain
CFO is involved — this is a relationship-defining situation
Board audit implications — CSM must understand scope before committing to any resolution timeline
CSM has 4 other open escalations on the same day

csm_time_breakdown.note: Case in progress — time tracking not yet complete
